_comment: Authored by Claude. Daemon reads this on every loop. Update whenever thesis changes — daemon picks up within one tick.

level_alerts.note: FLIPPED from BUY → SELL. US blockade of Iran day 4 = risk-off, AUD first to bleed. Short on bounce into this zone with rejection confirmation.
Break of 0.707 = prior pivot gone. Short on retest of 0.707 from below. Target 0.700.
DOUBLE TAILWIND: MoF intervention red line 160.00 + risk-off yen safe-haven bid from US-Iran escalation. Short on entry. Thesis STRONGER under blockade regime.
Break 158.50 = risk-off yen flight confirmed. Short on retest from below (no intervention needed — pure flow).
CAD oil-linked — US blockade → oil rip → CAD strong. Short USDCAD on bounce. Caveat: USD safe-haven bid could cap move; if DXY >99 abort.
Above Fri fakeout high = new breakout (retest rule). Note: under risk-off USD bid, EURUSD likely capped — low probability now.
WTI >$90 = blockade priced harder. US Navy blockade day 4, Hormuz fully closed, ships attacked. Monitor; do NOT chase — wait for pullback to break-retest.
WTI $95 = war-premium re-pricing. Brent $100+ scenario. Signal only, no entry here.
WTI <$83 = de-escalation. REMOTE — requires blockade lifted AND Iran ceasefire formally signed. Signal only.
NEW — safe-haven long on pullback into zone. Blockade + closed Hormuz + ship attacks = gold bid. Entry ~4800 with rejection wick, SL 4745, TP 4900/5000. Conv 3-4.
Break 4900 = momentum leg. Secondary entry on retest. Do NOT chase.
Psych level — exit zone for any gold longs; profit-take / partial.
